reviews.review_description: This Game Has Paid Items Which Is Illegal Because This Game Is A FNAF Fan Game And Scott Cothon Has Said That Fan Games Must Not Be Profitable So This Game Can Get Shut Down So You Should Probably Remove That, Overall This Game Is Fun But Needs Some Tweaks About The Power System And Needs A Charter Like Foxy Or Something Related To It.

Here’s some ideas to add, one, a tutorial. It took me a while to learn how to stop the endo skeleton, and people struggle to keep the door open when the animatronic is at the window, also people waste power so a tut can help. Two, being able to select wha night u wanna play. This can help a lot because people can practice other nights or deal with other difficulties. These are my recommendations for the full game, and for a demo this game is great!

This game sucks! Spent $10 for the Golden Teddy Pack. To many admins on to play the game. It was a waist of $10. Tried to get it refunded and it is not eligible for refund. I would not buy stuff in this game.
This game used to be fun but people with mod menus crash the game,play racist sounds and make the game bad and it makes no one actually get into the night.

Good game, but Unfortunately, I cannot beat night Two because the banana shocker button doesn't work, I never saw it work, so it's unbeatable, been playing for 2 days. 
Here's a list of stuff to fix: 
- Banana button broken
- Getting stuck on everything 
- Add a tutorial because the phone guy sucks

What makes it fun: 
- uhh fnaf but more tbh 
- good mechanics
- good graphics 
- Fun and funny VHS Tapes 
Game is overall a 7/10

I would not recommend this game. There are extreme bugs, racism, toxicity, unplayable, and many more. I was trying to play but every lobby was people swearing, people saying racist comments, bugs, people saying sexual things, people greifing and many more. WOULD NOT RECOMMEND!
